news-global-econ.title: Mark Levin: Democrats and media are not thinking this through | Fox News Video
news-global-econ.description: Fox News host Mark Levin revisits a surprising address to a joint congressional session and analyzes the current U.S. stance on Iran on 'Life, Liberty & Levin.'

news-global-econ.title: New study reveals most stressed US states — and they aren't where you'd expect
news-global-econ.description: A new WalletHub study ranks Louisiana as the most stressed U.S. state in 2026, citing poverty, limited health care access and high unemployment rates.

news-global-econ.title: Fans are demanding these 10 vanished ’80s and ’90s snacks return to store shelves
news-global-econ.description: Childhood nostalgia hits hard as fans revisit 10 beloved discontinued snacks from the '80s and '90s, from Planters PB Crisps to Cheetos Paws.

news-global-econ.title: WATCH LIVE: New York community holds vigil for student allegedly killed by illegal immigrant | Fox News Video
news-global-econ.description: The mother of Sheridan Gorman urges the grieving Yorktown Heights community to "fight back" against border policies after the 18-year-old student was allegedly murdered by a Venezuelan national released into the U.S. under the Biden administration.

news-global-econ.title: Baseball is changing forever with robot ump challenges
news-global-econ.description: MLB's new robot ump system lets players challenge ball-strike calls by tapping their head, with results appearing on stadium screens within seconds.

news-thai-soc.title: Yemen's Houthis Enter Iran Conflict with Missile Targeting Israel
news-thai-soc.description:
Yemen's Houthi rebels announced their entry into the Middle East war on Saturday by launching a ballistic missile towards Israel, as the world struggled to contain the economic damage of a conflict now entering its second month.

news-global-soc.title: JD Vance says he was 'obsessed' with UFOs, believes aliens are actually 'demons'
news-global-soc.description: Talking to conservative commentator Benny Johnson about the topic of UFOs, Vice President JD Vance noted that he believes aliens are actually demons.

news-global-soc.title: NASA races to build moon base as US challenges China in new space race
news-global-soc.description: NASA races to build a $20 billion lunar base as China and Russia advance moon ambitions, with experts warning China holds the advantage in space.

news-global-soc.title: Soros-backed group among liberal orgs pumping eye-popping cash into Virginia gerrymandering effort
news-global-soc.description: Virginia's redistricting referendum is being fueled by a tidal wave of liberal cash, with Soros- and Bloomberg-linked groups helping drive nearly $33 million into the effort.

news-global-soc.title: SOUTH CAROLINA AG WILSON: Fentanyl is a national security threat — follow the Chinese money
news-global-soc.description: South Carolina AG Alan Wilson says apps like WeChat and its Chinese counterpart Weixin enable fentanyl money laundering, calling the crisis a national security threat.
